perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a 2D animation. A bald character named A-Chow and a black-haired senior are sitting in a classroom. A-Chow looks bored, then mischievous. He writes a note and passes it to the senior. (2) The senior speaks the reply instead of writing. A-Chow suddenly becomes furious, his face turning red with fire in the background as he shouts about the rules of passing notes. (3) The scene shifts to A-Chow shivering from the cold air conditioning. He looks at the senior's jacket longingly, but the senior hands him a backpack instead. (4) A teacher is shown lecturing on 'National Defense'. A-Chow is worried he's annoying the senior, but the senior is actually just deeply focused on the lesson. (5) The video ends with a stats screen showing high grades for both characters.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Light, upbeat piano-driven background music plays. A youthful male voice (A-Chow) speaks in a conversational, bored tone. Sound effects of pencil scratching on paper are heard. (2) Music stops abruptly for a second, then shifts into a fast, intense, high-energy track. A-Chow's voice becomes a loud, exaggerated shout. (3) The music returns to a steady, quirky rhythm. Another male voice (the senior) is heard speaking in a calm, slightly confused tone. (4) A deep, professional male voice (the teacher) is heard briefly in the background. (5) Cartoon sound effects like 'boings', 'swishes', and 'dings' punctuate specific character actions throughout the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top title: '阿啾小劇場' (A-Chow's Theater). (2) Hook text in light blue box: '跟學長一起上課 期待會有一些小火花的阿啾' (Taking class with senior, A-Chow expecting some sparks). (3) Functional subtitles translate all spoken dialogue including '好無聊喔' (So bored) and '什麼規則' (What rules?). (4) Decorative text: '超認真聽課' (Super serious about listening to class) and '大失敗' (Big failure) appears with emotional emphasis. (5) Final text: A score board showing '阿啾 98' and '學長 96' followed by a national defense slogan.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Social Conflict (Note passing) -> Misunderstanding (The Jacket) -> Revelation (Serious Student) -> Result

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a 2D animation featuring a bald main character named Achusan. He is initially shown in a bedroom setting with shelves holding blue and red characters. (2) Three repetitive imaginative cycles occur: first, Achusan interacts with his mother who is leaving the room; second, he interacts with a male friend (Sheng-chang) going to the gym; third, he encounters a cat outside. In each cycle, Achusan's facial expressions shift from calm to intense as he imagines dramatic scenarios involving monsters or emotional hospital scenes. (3) The scene shifts to Achusan explaining his condition while his brain is shown with gears turning. He is then seen outdoors with his friend, freezing mid-conversation. Finally, he is shown lying face down on the floor, looking completely drained.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Whimsical and upbeat background music starts with a high-pitched male voice narrating enthusiastically. (2) As the 'little theater' imagination segments begin, the audio shifts between dramatic sound effects, suspenseful cues, and suddenly transitions into sentimental piano and violin melodies during the imagined hospital scenes. Voices of a middle-aged woman, a young man, and a cat meowing are heard. (3) The music returns to the upbeat theme during the explanation phase, interrupted by a monotone mechanical voice 'broadcasting' an imaginary title. The video concludes with the music fading out as the narrator sounds exhausted.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the dialogue and narration. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '阿啾小劇場' (Achusan's Little Theater) appears as a title card. '內心小劇場很多之人' (People with many internal dramas) serves as a thematic hook. Emotional captions like '救命!' perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is an animation. It begins in a school cafeteria where a bald, grumpy-looking character is talking to a dark-haired male senior. (2) The scene cuts to a wide shot of the school exterior. (3) A text card transitions the scene to the bald character's home at night, where he is seen at his desk with various textbooks. (4) He starts drawing handmade Japanese flashcards for Hiragana 'あ' (A), 'い' (I), and 'う' (U). (5) Each time he writes a character, quick, suggestive flashes of men's bodies appear in his mind, causing him to look increasingly distressed and sweaty. (6) Finally, he gives up in frustration and grabs a standard Japanese textbook titled '大家的日本語' (Everyone's Japanese).

Two distinct male voices are heard in conversation; one is serious and somewhat annoyed (the protagonist), while the other is relaxed. (2) A sharp 'shing' sound effect marks a scene transition. (3) The protagonist provides narration in a determined tone about making teaching materials. (4) When he begins writing characters, rhythmic heavy breathing and soft moaning sound effects play to accompany the suggestive visual flashes. (5) A comedic buzzer sound effect triggers when he decides to stop, followed by the music fading as he sighs and picks up the textbook.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Chronological subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '阿啾小劇場' (Achieu's Little Theater) is positioned at the top. '為了教學長日文而手作教材，但是...' (Hand-made materials to teach senior Japanese, but...) serves as a hook at the bottom. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a 2D animation starting with a bald character (the creator's avatar) sitting behind a desk with a sign reading '阿啾小劇場'. (4) A high-pitched, cute voice represents the 'Fairy' characters, contrasted with a deep, dismissive 'What the hell' comment at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the narration throughout. (3) A brief animated graphic appears showing three characters sitting at a table together with cups of tea or coffee. (4) A quick 'whoosh' sound effect plays during a visual transition to a graphic. (5) The voices become more intense toward the end, with the second male voice shouting in an exasperated tone as the music stops.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White subtitles at the bottom center of the frame translate the spoken Mandarin dialogue. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a 2D animation starting with a bald character in a black shirt and a grey-haired character in a red shirt standing at a train station ticket gate. (2) The grey-haired character waves goodbye, and the bald character turns away with a look of suppressed emotion. (3) On the train, the bald character sits between a woman and a man; he begins to cry intensely, with large tears streaming down his face and a distorted facial expression. (4) He tries to stifle his cries, looking increasingly distressed while the other passengers remain indifferent or oblivious. (5) He moves to the space between the train cars, sobbing uncontrollably against the door. (6) The final shot shows him curled in a corner, labeled as a 'Train Earthbound Spirit'.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Casual Mandarin dialogue between two males at a station with a neutral tone. (2) Melancholic, slow-tempo piano music enters as a male narrator's voice takes over, describing the pain of graduation and separation. (3) The narration is punctuated by loud, exaggerated sobbing sounds and sniffing sound effects. (4) The tone of the narrator becomes more frantic and embarrassed as he describes the social awkwardness of crying in public. (5) The music continues until a final punchline is delivered with a slightly more energetic vocal tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '阿啾小劇場' (A-Chu's Little Theater) appears as a consistent title at the top. (2) Hook Text: '遠距離戀愛時 在車站離別搞得很像偶像劇' (When in a long-distance relationship, saying goodbye at the station is like an idol drama) - sentimental tone. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the Mandarin narration and dialogue. (4) Decorative Text: '列車地縛靈' (Train Earthbound Spirit) - humorous tone at the end. (5) Decorative Text: '完整影片在Youtube' (Full video on Youtube) - functional CTA.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The story follows a farewell at a station, an emotional breakdown on a train, and a humorous reality check.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a 2D animated character resembling Namewee sitting in a chair against a simple wooden wall, introducing the story. (2) It transitions to a flashback in an animated classroom where a gray-haired male teacher stands behind a donation box. (3) Various students are shown, including one mentioning 'BMW' and 'Toyota'. (4) The main Namewee character is shown at his desk, looking frustrated, with a small blue demon appearing on his shoulder to advise him. (5) He then stands up and rallies his classmates in front of a chalkboard. (6) The scene shifts to the teacher confronting Namewee, and then to the principal's office where the principal (a bald man in a striped shirt) scolds the teacher. (7) The animation returns to the narrator in the initial room. (8) At 01:26, the medium shifts to live-action, showing adults in a chaotic indoor playground/fast-food setting, some dressed in mascot-like costumes (red wigs, boots), interacting aggressively while a man plays a ukulele.

(2) A more serious, slightly deeper male voice (the teacher) speaks, followed by various student voices responding with car brand names. (3) Transition SFX (wooshes and pings) accompany the character's thoughts and the appearance of the blue demon. (4) The audio features a mix of dialogue and dramatic musical stings during the confrontation. (5) In the final segment, the audio changes to a full musical track: an upbeat folk-pop song featuring ukulele and Namewee's singing voice, overlaid with ambient noise of people shouting and crashing sounds in a live environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate all spoken dialogue throughout the video. (搶劫) and 'Justice Fairy' (正義仙子) appear for comedic effect. (4) Promotional Text: '黃明志最新專輯《小明與小志》正式上線!' perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a 2D animation featuring a bald male character and a female character in an indoor room with computer monitors. (6) The video ends with a loud, synchronized scream from both characters, followed by a brief silence and a final comedic remark.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A large blue plush character representing 'A-Chiu' is lying on a bed with a gray sheet, snoring loudly. A smartphone is placed next to it. (2) The character wakes up, showing expressive yellow eyes and a wide mouth; it rolls around on the bed, performing exaggerated movements to show its reluctance to get up. (3) The character decide to fake an illness, and the scene shows a close-up of a smartphone placed on its 'face' as it dials a contact labeled 'Boss'. (4) A text notification pops up on the phone screen showing an overdue credit card bill of 69,000 NTD. (5) The character's expression shifts, and it is suddenly seen standing upright in a storage room filled with merchandise boxes. (6) The final phase transitions to 2D graphic illustrations of characters shopping, followed by a screen displaying social media links and a website address.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Loud, heavy snoring sounds dominate the audio landscape. (2) A repetitive alarm voice says 'Get up, Rebel' in Mandarin. (3) A deep male voice (A-Chiu) speaks in a whiny, sluggish tone, complaining about lack of sleep and wanting to stay in bed. (4) The sound of a phone dialing is followed by another male voice (Boss) answering with 'Hello? What's up?'. (5) A-Chiu's voice changes to a weak, raspy, fake-sick tone asking for leave. (6) A message notification chime rings, followed by a calm female voice reading a text message about a credit card debt. (7) A-Chiu's voice suddenly becomes loud and energetic, shouting that he is fully recovered. (8) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts as a narrator introduces the grand opening of the store.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '(地獄打呼聲)': Descriptive caption for 'Hellish snoring'. (2) '起床嘍叛逆': Functional text meaning 'Wake up, Rebel'. (3) '可惡昨天失眠沒睡飽', '好想睡覺', '好不想上班喔': Series of captions expressing exhaustion and desire to skip work. (4) '對了今天就裝病好了': Narrative text meaning 'By the way, I'll just fake being sick today'. (5) '老闆：喂？怎麼了': Dialogue identifying the speaker as the boss. (6) '您本期信用卡卡費已逾期...繳納69000元': A mock iMessage showing a heavy credit card debt. (7) '沒事了我康復了': Hook text meaning 'I'm fine, I've recovered'. (8) '三十歲的叛逆仙子 奮力上班中', '阿啾小賣店 正式開張！': Promotional text for the store opening with a humorous title.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Waking up -> Faking illness -> Financial shock -> Work scene -> Store Promotion

The scene transitions to him holding a printed itinerary with an ecstatic expression. (2) Infographics appear showing the 'SOP' of planning: 'DATA', 'TIME', and 'POINT' layout. A-Chu is shown shirtless and sweating as he admires his travel plan as if it were a work of art. (3) A scene transition shows a framed picture titled 'Kyoto Trip', and a blonde character holds a 'Pick Me' sign offering money for the itinerary. (4) A second character with black hair (Senpai) is introduced. They are shown together in various settings: at a restaurant, planning a 5 AM wake-up call, and eventually at a hot spring. (5) A-Chu's expression shifts from proud to annoyed as he realizes Senpai is a 'P-type' traveler (passive follower).
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, rhythmic background music plays. A high-pitched, energetic male voice provides a narration about the habits of 'J-type' (Judging) people. (2) Sound effects like 'ding' and 'swoosh' emphasize text appearing on screen. The narrator's tone becomes exaggeratedly emotional when describing the 'art' of the itinerary. (3) A brief interaction occurs where another male voice with a calmer, slightly deeper tone responds with 'Okay' repeatedly. (4) The music remains upbeat until the end when a comical 'shock' sound effect plays as the punchline is delivered. (5) The final segment features overlapping voices of both characters in a quick back-and-forth dialogue.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: '阿啾小劇場' (A-Chu's Little Theater) appears at the top throughout. (2) Functional: Subtitles at the bottom translate the dialogue about travel planning SOPs and MBTI types. (3) Hook: 'J人的夢想是把行程表放進美術館展覽' (A J-person's dream is to put the itinerary in an art museum) serves as the main theme. (4) Decorative: 'Artist!', 'Kyoto', 'Pick Me!', 'Jolly-high', and '恐怖情人' (Horror Lover) appear as variety-show style captions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro to J-type planning -> Demonstration of itinerary perfection -> Interaction with P-type companion -> Comical realization/punchline.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a 2D animation. It starts with a bald character (Ah Chou) sleeping peacefully until a loud noise startles him awake. (2) He looks toward a bed where a young girl (Ah Ni) is screaming and crying while a woman attempts to soothe her. (3) Ah Chou tries various methods to calm the girl: he checks his phone to call her mother, then uses a blue monkey plush toy to perform a character called 'Panini Fairy'. (4) He then uses a tablet showing a Mickey Mouse face to perform an impression. (5) Throughout these attempts, the girl's facial expressions remain distressed and angry as she rejects his efforts. (6) The video ends with a close-up of Ah Chou's defeated and weary face.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a loud, piercing scream of a young girl, followed by a man's startled and confused vocalizations. (2) High-pitched, rhythmic crying and wailing from the child continue throughout, overlaid with a woman's soft, concerned tone and a man's increasingly desperate speech. (3) Sound effects include a telephone ringing followed by a flat, synthesized female voice saying a standard 'no answer' message. (4) The man's voice shifts through several distinct characters: his normal mid-range tone, a high-pitched whimsical voice for the plush toy, and a raspy, forced impression of Mickey Mouse. (5) No background music is present; the soundscape is dominated by vocals and the child's crying.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles synchronized with the dialogue. (2) Decorative Text: '阿啾小劇場' (Ah Chou's Mini Theater) at the top header. (3) Hook Text: '小孩半夜哭鬧 內心受傷的阿啾' (Child crying at midnight, Ah Chou's heart is hurt) displayed in a central bar. (4) Call to Action: '完整影片在Youtube' (Full video on YouTube) at the bottom footer.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Conflict (Child crying) -> Failed comfort attempts -> Final defeat

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Non-live action animation featuring a bald man as the protagonist. (4) He sits in a chair scrolling through a smartphone with a judgmental, squinting expression. (5) A black-haired friend appears in the frame, looking at him with a deadpan expression as the protagonist shouts in a final comedic panel.

(3) A 'swish' sound effect occurs as the character moves toward the bed, followed by a loud, muffled thud when he lands on the mattress. (4) The vocal density increases as the protagonist speaks fast-paced, high-pitched sentences to himself about staying young. (5) A second male voice speaks in a calm, flat tone at the end, followed by a loud, comedic shout from the main character.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a 2D animation featuring a bald, large-headed character (A-Chu) as the protagonist. It starts with a talking-head style where the character looks frustrated while explaining his poor sense of direction. (2) The scene shifts to show various street signs with names like "San Mou Road" and "Jojo Street," followed by complex mathematical equations overlaid on a character to represent confusion. (3) A transition occurs to a dialogue scene between two characters discussing directions using specific landmarks. (4) A-Chu is then shown riding a motorcycle through an animated neighborhood, wearing a blue helmet and looking focused. (5) He stops to check a digital map on a smartphone, looking confused. (6) He arrives at a storefront that is boarded up with a "Closed" sign, and his expression changes to shock and despair. (7) The final phase returns to the talking-head style with dizzy eyes, followed by a close-up plea to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music plays throughout. A male voice speaks in a high-pitched, energetic, and humorous tone in Traditional Chinese. (2) Sound effects including a "pop" sound for text transitions and the muffled roar of a motorcycle engine are heard. (3) A sudden, loud, distorted vocal shout/explosion sound occurs when the character realizes the shop is closed. (4) The music continues with a consistent rhythm as the narrator delivers a final comedic plea, followed by a short silence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken dialogue about getting lost and the difficulty of remembering road names. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: "阿啾小劇場" (A-Chu's Little Theater) and "阿啾LOVE" appear at the top. "你也是超級迷路人嗎" (Are you also a super lost person?) is a hook text in a black bar. (3) Effect Text: "二十分鐘後" (20 minutes later) appears as a time transition. (4) Call to Action: "完整影片左Youtube" (Full video on the left Youtube) stays at the bottom throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Abstract explanation of the problem -> Concrete situational example -> Climax/Failure -> Humorous conclusion.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is primarily an anime-style animation. It begins with a male news anchor character called 'Senior' in a news studio with a lime-green mascot. (2) The scene transitions to real-life news footage showing heavy rain, flooded streets, and a reporter in a suit standing in a storm. (3) A large black graphic of the character '風' (Wind) appears, followed by '颱風' (Typhoon). (4) The video shifts to a montage of real-life K-pop concert footage featuring groups like BLACKPINK, Super Junior, and TWICE performing on stage. (5) A graphic of '韓風' (Korean Wave) is displayed. (6) The animation returns, showing a bald man (the creator Ar Chou) crawling on the floor in visible agony. (7) The final graphic '痛風' (Gout) appears as the punchline. (8) The news anchor character gestures with his hands as the video concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A deep, professional, yet energetic male voiceover begins narrating in a dramatic news-reporting style. Fast-paced, rhythmic background music with a strong beat starts immediately. (2) Ambient sounds of wind and heavy rain are mixed in as the visual shows a typhoon. (3) Short, high-energy snippets of electronic dance music/K-pop are heard during the concert segment. (4) Distinct 'Impact' or 'Whoosh' sound effects occur every time a large title graphic appears on screen. (5) The narrator's tone remains consistent but shifts towards a comedic inflection during the mention of gout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '大家好我是學長' (Hello everyone, I am Senior), '台灣這一年發生的各種大事件' (Various major events in Taiwan this year). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '2025台灣重大新聞總結' (Summary of Major 2025 Taiwan News) at the bottom, and large stylistic kanji for '風' (Wind), '颱風' (Typhoon), '韓風' (Korean Wave), and '痛風' (Gout). (3) Content & Tone: The text provides a humorous structure to the news summary, culminating in a self-deprecating joke about the creator's health.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a comedic news wrap-up for the year 2025 in Taiwan. It cleverly uses the phonetic and semantic associations of the Chinese character '風' (Wind) to link natural disasters (typhoons), the cultural dominance of the 'Korean Wave' (Hallyu), and the creator's personal health issue (gout), providing an entertaining summary that drives viewers to his full YouTube content.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'Hallyu' as a news milestone reflects the high cultural impact of K-pop in Taiwan. The juxtaposition of professional news style with personal health issues creates a relatable comedy effect.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is an animated video. (4) The scene shifts to a dark background as the senior asks to hold hands; the bald character's eyes widen in shock. (5) A close-up shot shows their hands joined, with visible sweat and trembling lines. (6) A small, chibi-version of the senior is shown huddled and shivering against a dark background. (7) The video ends with the bald character (creator avatar) sitting at a desk in a studio-like room filled with plushies.

(2) A sudden, dramatic orchestral sting plays when the character reveals his muscles, followed by a deeper vocal tone. (3) Playful, mid-tempo BGM enters as they continue talking. (4) A sharp 'ding' sound effect and a sudden silence occur when the senior asks to hold hands. (5) Sound of rapid trembling and comic SFX accompany the hand-holding scene. (6) High-speed narration with upbeat, comedic music leads into the outro. (7) A consistent outro jingle plays as the narrator says his signature closing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate all spoken dialogue. perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A large blue mascot character with yellow eyes and a wide mouth sits on a grey L-shaped sofa in a modern living room, surrounded by various snack bags. (3) A training montage follows: the mascot attempts cable rows and squats while the coach observes; a red medicine ball is thrown at the mascot, hitting it in the face. (4) The mascot lies on a gym mat as the coach performs aggressive stretching and massage on its soft, pillow-like limbs. (5) The mascot is seen behind a counter filled with branded merchandise including boxes, stickers, and socks. (6) The video ends with a 2D animation of two characters and a cat pushing a shopping cart, followed by a graphic displaying a website URL and social media handles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, bouncy synth-pop background music begins as a high-pitched, energetic male voice (mascot) speaks continuously. (2) The soundscape transitions as a calm, natural male voice (coach) enters, followed by ambient gym noise including the clinking of weights. (3) During the training sequence, the music becomes more driving with a faster tempo, interspersed with physical sound effects like thuds and heavy breathing. (4) The stretching segment is characterized by series of loud, exaggerated, high-pitched comical screams and 'ouch' sound effects. (5) The final phase features a deeper narrator voice delivering a promotional announcement over a triumphant, jingle-like melody.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional white subtitles appear at the bottom reflecting the spoken dialogue about getting fat and going to the gym. (Achusan Shop Officially Open!) and 'GRAND OPENING'. (4) A list of social media links and the website 'ACHUSAN.COM' is displayed at the very end.

perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a 2D animation video. A bald male character is lying in bed, staring at the ceiling with a wide-eyed, thoughtful expression, then touches his chest. (2) He stands up, looking conflicted, then moves to a computer desk to search for dating advice. (3) The screen shows a blog titled 'Xiao Ye's Love Consultation Room'. (4) He attempts to type a romantic message on his smartphone, but his facial expression turns to shock as he realizes an autocorrect error. (5) He calls his partner, appearing increasingly agitated and sweaty as the conversation progresses. (6) In a final twist, a black-haired male character appears behind him with a smug expression, holding a phone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Light, upbeat Lo-fi background music plays. A male voice (A Chuo) narrates his inner monologue in a soft, contemplative tone. (2) Sound of rapid keyboard typing. (3) A second, calmer male voice (Xiao Ye) is heard reading blog text in a professional, almost satirical 'expert' tone. (4) A digital notification sound triggers as a text message is sent. (5) A phone conversation ensues; the partner's voice is gentle and romantic, contrasting with A Chuo's loud, frantic, and high-pitched responses. (6) Music swells into a dramatic sting, followed by a loud, realization-filled shout from the main character.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles appear throughout, tracking the dialogue and internal thoughts. (2) '歡迎來到情場高手小葉的戀愛諮詢室' (Welcome to Love Expert Xiao Ye's Love Consultation Room) - decorative title on a webpage. (3) '學長寶雅生活館' (Senior BoYa Living Mart) - large, bold decorative text used for comedic emphasis on an autocorrect fail. (4) '到底在聊什麼' (What on earth are we talking about?) - variety-show style emotional sticker.
